items.text: PROMPT MASKING  •  DATA PRIVACY  •  LLM SECURITY

AI Sees the Question.
Never Your Secrets.
FMD TECH masks PII, credentials and confidential data inside your prompts in real time — before they ever reach an LLM. Full model power, zero data exposure.
SOC 2 Type II   •   GDPR & HIPAA ready   •   Zero prompt retention
Everything You Need to Mask at Scale
One privacy layer between your organization and every model you use
Names, emails, card numbers and 120+ entity types detected and masked in-flight, before the prompt leaves your network.
Sensitive values are swapped for consistent tokens, then re-hydrated in the response — models keep context, you keep the data.
Define what gets masked, redacted or blocked per team, per model and per data class — no code changes required.
One drop-in gateway for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and self-hosted models. Switch providers without touching your privacy layer.
Every masking event is logged and exportable. Prove GDPR, HIPAA and SOC 2 compliance with a single report.
Edge-deployed detection adds under 40ms to any request — your users never notice the protection is there.
Point your LLM traffic at the FMD proxy or drop in our SDK — no model or app changes required.
PII, credentials and trade secrets are detected and tokenized in real time, inside your perimeter.
Responses are re-hydrated on the way back — users see complete answers, models never see real data.
From fintech to healthcare, teams ship AI faster because the data risk is handled
"FMD TECH sits between our apps and every model we use. PII never leaves our perimeter anymore, and our legal team finally signed off on GenAI in production."
"We rolled out masking across 40+ internal AI tools in a week. The policy engine meant zero code changes for our product teams."
"Reversible tokenization was the unlock. Models get full context, we keep the secrets, and our audits are finally painless."
Mask Your First Prompt in Minutes
Free for your first 100,000 prompts. No credit card, no sales call required.
What Is Prompt Masking, and Why Every AI Team Needs It
Every prompt your teams send to an LLM is a potential data leak. Here is how masking closes the gap without slowing anyone down.
GDPR Meets GenAI: Staying Compliant When Prompts Contain PII
Regulators now treat prompts as personal data processing. What that means for your architecture, and how to stay ahead of it.
Tokenization vs. Redaction: Choosing the Right Masking Strategy
Both hide sensitive data — but they behave very differently once the model responds. A practical guide to picking per use case.
Stay Ahead of AI Data Risk
Monthly briefings on prompt security, compliance and LLM privacy. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
We practice what we mask — your email is never shared.
The privacy layer between your organization and every LLM. Mask sensitive data in real time, without losing model performance.
